# jc

> JumpCloud CLI ‚Äî manage users, devices, groups, policies, commands, insights, and more

The jc CLI is a Go-based command-line tool for JumpCloud ‚Äî managing users, devices, groups, policies, applications, commands, insights, and more. It exposes every JumpCloud resource through a consistent verb-noun grammar with structured JSON output, an MCP server for AI agents, and a recipe system for declarative automation.

## Command catalog

### Identity & Access

- `jc users` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud system users
- `jc groups` ‚Äî Manage user and device groups
- `jc admins` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud administrators
- `jc auth-policies` ‚Äî Manage authentication policies for conditional access
- `jc iplists` ‚Äî Manage IP lists for authentication policies
- `jc identity-providers` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud identity providers for SSO/OIDC federation

### Devices & MDM

- `jc devices` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud devices (systems)
- `jc apple-mdm` ‚Äî Manage Apple MDM configurations + browse schemas + emit mobileconfigs + create JC policies
- `jc windows-mdm` ‚Äî Create Windows custom MDM policies (OMA-URI and registry)

### Apps & SSO

- `jc apps` ‚Äî Manage SSO applications
- `jc saas-management` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud SaaS Management applications
- `jc app-templates` ‚Äî View application templates

### Policies & Commands

- `jc commands` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud commands
- `jc policies` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud policies
- `jc policy-templates` ‚Äî View policy templates
- `jc policy-groups` ‚Äî Manage policy groups

### Insights

- `jc insights` ‚Äî Query Directory Insights audit events
- `jc system-insights` ‚Äî Query osquery system insight tables

### Integrations

- `jc software` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud software apps
- `jc assets` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud assets (devices, accessories, locations)
- `jc ldap` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud LDAP servers
- `jc ad` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud Active Directory integrations
- `jc radius` ‚Äî Manage RADIUS servers
- `jc gsuite` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud Google Workspace (G Suite) integrations
- `jc office365` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud Office 365 integrations
- `jc duo` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud Duo accounts and applications

### Org & Lifecycle

- `jc access-requests` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud temporary elevated device privilege requests
- `jc org` ‚Äî View and update JumpCloud organization information
- `jc user-states` ‚Äî Manage scheduled user state transitions
- `jc custom-emails` ‚Äî Manage custom email templates
- `jc graph` ‚Äî Manage JumpCloud resource associations
- `jc bulk` ‚Äî Bulk operations from CSV files

### AI & Automation

- `jc recipe` ‚Äî Manage and run automation recipes
- `jc mcp` ‚Äî MCP server for AI agent integration
- `jc schema` ‚Äî Machine-readable schema and command manifest
- `jc ask` ‚Äî Translate natural language queries into jc CLI commands
- `jc explain` ‚Äî Explain what a command would do without executing

### Setup

- `jc auth` ‚Äî Authentication commands
- `jc config` ‚Äî Configuration management

### Diagnostics

- `jc audit` ‚Äî Run cross-resource health checks (security, compliance, hygiene, identity)
- `jc doctor` ‚Äî No-auth diagnostic ‚Äî env, config, auth resolution, API connectivity

## See also

- [Full reference](llms-full.txt)
- [Machine-readable manifest](commands.json)
- [Source repository](https://github.com/TheJumpCloud/jc-cli)
